page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: MapCaller: combined short-read mapper and variant caller
page_metadata.biotools__summary: MapCaller – An integrated and efficient tool for short-read mapping and variant calling using high-throughput sequenced data | MapCaller – An efficient and versatile approach for short-read alignment and variant detection in high-throughput sequenced genomes | MapCaller: An efficient and versatile approach for short-read mapping and variant identification using high-throughput sequenced data | MapCaller aligns every NGS short read against a reference genome and collects all the alignment information to deduce sequence variants
